manifest.match_rule: compare generated SHA-256(seed) prefixes directly against raw transformed target bytes

transforms.name: global-freq-to-seed-common
transforms.reason: map frequent source bytes to the most common finite seed-output bytes

transforms.name: global-freq-to-seed-rare
transforms.reason: opposite-rank control for global seed-output byte alignment

transforms.name: global-rare-to-seed-common
transforms.reason: rare-source control for finite seed-output byte alignment

transforms.name: phase4-freq-to-seed-pos
transforms.reason: map phase-local source frequencies to seed-output bytes at matching phase

transforms.name: phase8-freq-to-seed-pos
transforms.reason: span-position byte permutation against the first 8 seed-output bytes

summary.conclusion: Byte-permutation transforms did not produce prefix>=5 or exact seed-span rows.
